recommendations.title: Mythica: The Darkspore
recommendations.overview: Fighting through creature-infested lands and pursued by bounty hunters, Marek and her company are in a race to recover all the shards of the Darkspore before it falls into the hands of an evil wizard.

recommendations.title: Black Clover: Sword of the Wizard King
recommendations.overview: As a lionhearted boy who can't wield magic strives for the title of Wizard King, four banished Wizard Kings of yore return to crush the Clover Kingdom.

recommendations.title: Green Snake
recommendations.overview: While trying to free her sister from Fahai's clutches, Xiao Qing winds up in a dystopian city and meets a mysterious man who can't recall his past life.

recommendations.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
recommendations.overview: Frodo Baggins and the other members of the Fellowship continue on their sacred quest to destroy the One Ring--but on separate paths. Their destinies lie at two towers--Orthanc Tower in Isengard, where the corrupt wizard Saruman awaits, and Sauron's f

recommendations.title: The Watermelon Woman
recommendations.overview: A young black lesbian filmmaker probes into the life of The Watermelon Woman, a 1930s black actress who played 'mammy' archetypes.

recommendations.title: Cat Soup
recommendations.overview: The surreal black comedy follows Nyatta, an anthropomorphic kitten, on his travel to the land of the dead and back in an effort to save his sister's soul.

recommendations.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
recommendations.overview: Black Manta seeks revenge on Aquaman for his father's death. Wielding the Black Trident's power, he becomes a formidable foe. To defend Atlantis, Arthur (Aquaman) forges an alliance with his imprisoned brother. They must protect the kingdom.

recommendations.title: Tekkonkinkreet
recommendations.overview: Two penniless orphans, Black and White, struggle to survive on the mean streets of Treasure Town. When a megacorporation threatens to tear down the town to build an amusement park, Black and White engage in the fight of their life.

recommendations.title: Haunted Mansion
recommendations.overview: A woman and her son enlist a motley crew of so-called spiritual experts to help rid their home of supernatural squatters.

recommendations.title: Shaft
recommendations.overview: Cool Black private eye John Shaft is hired by a crime lord to find and retrieve his kidnapped daughter.
